_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: SHOC2-KO MPNST cells were more sensitive to trametinib treatment with an appreciable reduction in the trametinib IC50 value
details: SHOC2 knockout resulted in appreciable reduction in trametinib IC50 value and decreased synergism with ripretinib combination
